raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX I was checking my Macy 's America Express account online and was shocked to discover that charge had posted to my account for {$1100.00}. I had never authorized this charge, and was not even notify. I have called and file a dispute about this issue with Macy 's serval times, I've never received a respond from this company or alert from Macy 's that a merchant was attempting to charge my account this very large sum without the card being present. Because of this issue my credit score has decease tremendous and I have suffered tremendously as well. For my pain and suffering I would like to be reimbursed compensated {$1100.00}.
